Auth.tagline: Manage your personal finances with clarity.
Auth.loginDescription: Enter your credentials to access your account.
Auth.registerDescription: Welcome to Cashonomy. Get started in seconds.
Auth.verifyEmailDescription: We sent you a confirmation link. Click the link in your inbox to continue.
Auth.verifyEmailHint: Don't forget to check your spam folder if you can't find the link.
Auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
Auth.resetPasswordDescription: Choose a strong password you haven't used before.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

toast.notImplemented: Supabase integration will be added in the next step.
toast.resetEmailSent: If an account exists for {email}, a reset link has been sent.
toast.passwordUpdated: Your password has been updated. Please sign in.
toast.resetSessionMissing: Reset link is invalid or expired. Please request a new one.
